testcase.name: testLoginPageTitle
testcase.system-out:
CONFIGURING TESTNG
2026-07-19 19:19:33 [main] INFO com.thetestingacademy.tests.careconnect.TestLogin - ══════ Setting up WebDriver ══════ 2026-07-19 19:19:34 [main] INFO com.thetestingacademy.tests.careconnect.TestLogin - Browser launched: ChromeDriver 2026-07-19 19:19:34 [main] INFO com.thetestingacademy.tests.careconnect.TestLogin - ▶ Starting: testLoginPageTitle 2026-07-19 19:19:38 [main] INFO com.thetestingacademy.tests.careconnect.TestLogin - Page title: CareConnect 2026-07-19 19:19:38 [main] INFO com.thetestingacademy.tests.careconnect.TestLogin - ✔ Passed: testLoginPageTitle
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. تموز ١٩, ٢٠٢٦ ٧:١٩:٣٤ م org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching ١٥٠ تموز ١٩, ٢٠٢٦ ٧:١٩:٣٤ م org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 150.0.7871.125. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.31.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
